trans-unit.source: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.
trans-unit.target: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.

trans-unit.source: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.
trans-unit.target: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.

trans-unit.source: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.
trans-unit.target: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.

trans-unit.source: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.
trans-unit.target: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.

trans-unit.source: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.
trans-unit.target: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.

trans-unit.source: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.
trans-unit.target: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.

trans-unit.source: .NET installation manager for user level installs.
trans-unit.target: .NET installation manager for user level installs.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry
trans-unit.target: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry
